shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch mascot sitting on a flat file with a server crossed out above it, representing SQLite's serverless design.
assets.caption: Hatch mascot sitting on a flat file with a server crossed out above it, representing SQLite's serverless design.
assets.prompt: SQLite | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with the graduation cap and growth arrow) sitting cross-legged on a giant single flat file, with a minimalist database cylinder icon floating above it with a large red X through it. Background is warm cream. Hatch looks calm and satisfied, graduation cap slightly tilted. No speech bubble. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch standing before a ship-deck scene with disconnected cables, illustrating the embedded deployment problem.
assets.caption: Hatch standing before a ship-deck scene with disconnected cables, illustrating the embedded deployment problem.

assets.alt: Hatch explaining the contrast between client-server and embedded library database architecture.
assets.caption: Hatch explaining the contrast between client-server and embedded library database architecture.
assets.prompt: SQLite | failure-mechanism: Hatch in a thinking pose, gesturing at a split diagram: left side shows a conventional client-server setup with arrows going across a network boundary; right side shows a C library compiling directly into an application binary with a single .db file underneath. The right side is highlighted. Cream background. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression.
